Dialog.name: Item_001
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A cutting-edge portable music player that can be worn around the neck.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_002
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A cute, white choker shaped like a heart.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_003
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A stylish silver necklace. Currently trending in men's fashion magazines.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_005
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fake nails adorned with beautiful jewels. Gorgeous and elegant.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_006
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An adorable necklace that's all the rage among high school girls.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_007
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A large, crimson ribbon. Adds flair and color to the collar.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_008
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A simple wristband designed for the athletically inclined.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_009
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An ornamental accessory resembling angel wings. Minimally functional.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_00A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A simple, no-frills, knitted cap for men.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_00B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A tough rope band. Boosts physical strength slightly.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_00C
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A tough rope band. Boosts physical strength moderately.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_00D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A tough rope band. Boosts physical strength considerably.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_00E
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A mystical silk band. Boosts magical power slightly.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_00F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A mystical silk band. Boosts magical power moderately.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_010
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A mystical silk band. Boosts magical power considerably.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_011
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A rugged steel band. Boosts defensive endurance slightly.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_012
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A rugged steel band. Boosts defensive endurance moderately.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_013
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A rugged steel band. Boosts defensive endurance considerably.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_014
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An airy fabric band. Makes one feel slightly lighter.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_015
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An airy fabric band. Makes one feel moderately lighter.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_016
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An airy fabric band. Makes one feel considerably lighter.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_017
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A flashy braided band. Boosts good fortune slightly.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_018
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A flashy braided band. Boosts good fortune moderately.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_019
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A flashy braided band. Boosts good fortune considerably.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_01A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A luxurious silver band. Boosts all attributes slightly.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_01B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A luxurious translucent band. Boosts all attributes considerably.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_020
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A tough rope band. Boosts physical strength immensely.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_021
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A mystical silk band. Boosts magical power immensely.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_022
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A rugged steel band. Boosts defensive endurance immensely.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_023
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An airy fabric band. Makes one feel immensely lighter.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_024
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A flashy braided band. Boosts good fortune immensely.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_027
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Temporarily makes the wearer stronger at the start of a battle.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_028
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Temporarily makes the wearer more durable at the start of a battle.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_029
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Temporarily makes the wearer more agile at the start of a battle.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_02A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A bangle with a flame design. Increases Fire damage.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_02B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Contains the power of the fire god. Greatly increases Fire damage.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_02C
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A bangle with a glacier design. Increases Ice damage.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_02D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Contains the power of the ice god. Greatly increases Ice damage.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_02E
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A bangle with a lightning design. Increases Electric damage.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_02F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Contains the power of the sky god. Greatly increases Electric damage.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_030
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A bangle with a storm design. Increases Wind damage.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_031
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Contains the power of the wind god. Greatly increases Wind damage.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_032
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A mysterious rosary that raises the wearer's Attack when enraged.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_033
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An adorable pumpkin mask. Increases Dark damage.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_034
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Temporarily makes all allies stronger at the start of a battle.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_035
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Temporarily makes all allies more durable at the start of a battle.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_036
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Temporarily makes all allies more agile at the start of a battle.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_037
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Temporarily raises the wearer's critical rate at the start of a battle.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_039
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An instructional text of techniques for dodging physical attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_03A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A charm of primitive design. Bestows an ability to dodge magic attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_03B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An instructional text of techniques for dodging Slash attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_03C
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An advanced text of teachings to more easily dodge Slash attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_03D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An instructional text of techniques for dodging Strike attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_03E
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An advanced text of teachings to more easily dodge Strike attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_03F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An instructional text of techniques for dodging Pierce attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_040
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An advanced text of teachings to more easily dodge Pierce attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_041
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A charm of primitive design. Bestows an ability to dodge Fire attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_042
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Greatly increases the ability to dodge Fire attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_043
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A charm of primitive design. Bestows an ability to dodge Ice attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_044
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Greatly increases the ability to dodge Ice attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_045
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A charm of primitive design. Bestows an ability to dodge Wind attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_046
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Greatly increases the ability to dodge Wind attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_047
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A charm of primitive design. Bestows an ability to dodge Electric attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_048
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Greatly increases the ability to dodge Electric attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_049
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}These robust locks improve one's ability to react to physical attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_04A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An ancient text that delineates the secrets of dodging magic attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_04B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An intimidating armband. Makes the wearer harder to hit.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_04C
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A charm of primitive design. Bestows an ability to dodge Light attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_04D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Greatly increases the ability to dodge Light attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_04E
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A charm of primitive design. Bestows an ability to dodge Dark attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_04F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Greatly increases the ability to dodge Dark attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_051
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A steel sheath once used by the god of swords. It's said to block any blade.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_052
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A thick, golden scale. Invulnerable to blunt strikes.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_053
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An indestructible earthenware figure that cannot be pierced.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_054
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A stone infused with a flame so hot, it renders all other heat trivial.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_055
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A beautiful, navy blue crystal. Shuts out all forms of frost and chill.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_056
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Gloves worn by the god of thunder. Dispels all electricity.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_057
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A ring fashioned in the likeness of a gale. Quells even the fiercest storms.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_058
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A pure white ring. Protects from holy forms of power.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_059
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An obsidian black ring. Stymies dark forces.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_05A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A special armlet that emits a frosty aura. Prevents Freeze.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_05B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A special armlet that emits a static aura. Prevents Shock.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_05C
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An accessory shaped like the horn of a unicorn. Prevents Poison.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_05D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An ornament that resembles a horde of spirits. Prevents Confuse.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_05E
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A ball and chain. Weirdly comforting. Prevents Distress.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_05F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A flower decoration that removes all temptation. Prevents Charm.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_060
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A palm-sized eyeball. Squeezing it calms the nerves. Prevents Fear.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_061
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A blue, luxurious ring. Gazing at it quells anger. Prevents Rage.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_062
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A book that prevents Confuse, Distress, Charm, Fear, and Rage.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_063
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sphere made of an unknown material that's nigh indestructible.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_064
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The mark of a masterful warrior. Low chance to counter physical attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_065
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The mark of a god of war. Medium chance to counter physical attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_066
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The mark of a fearsome berserker. High chance to counter physical attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_067
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A holy artifact. The user cannot dodge, but damage taken is halved.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_068
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}High-end goggles that offer unimpaired vision even in pitch darkness.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_069
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Helps stave off maladies of the mind, such as fear and temptation.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_06A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A piece of wood with a soothing aroma. Speeds up ailment recovery.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_06B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Contains a pleasant fragrance. Quickly cures status ailments.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_06D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This seal emanates the power of land. Restores a tiny bit of HP each turn.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_06E
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This seal emanates the power of earth. Restores a little bit of HP each turn.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_06F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}This seal emanates the power of space. Restores some HP each turn.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_070
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A badge that awakens the power of qi. Restores a tiny bit of SP each turn.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_071
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A badge that raises the power of qi. Restores a little bit of SP each turn.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_072
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A badge overflowing with the power of qi. Restores some SP each turn.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_073
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An adorable doll received from Maiko. Restores a tiny bit of SP each turn.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_075
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A divine artifact that restores all HP upon death once per battle.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_076
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Prayer beads enabling survival of a single Dark instakill attack with 1 HP.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_077
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Accessory enabling survival of a single Light instakill attack with 1 HP.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_078
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A bracelet enabling survival of a single instakill attack with 1 HP.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_07D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A brooch made of costly materials. It's expensive, but doesn't do anything.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_07E
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A ring that reduces the HP cost of physical skills by half.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_07F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A ring that reduces the SP cost of magic skills by half.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_081
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Lowers the odds of sustaining critical hits.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_085
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sash like the samurai wore. Kindles a tiny bit of vitality.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_086
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sash like the samurai wore. Kindles a little bit of vitality.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_087
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sash like the samurai wore. Kindles some vitality.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_088
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sash like the samurai wore. Kindles considerable vitality.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_089
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A sash like the samurai wore. Kindles immense vitality.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_08A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A bold, red banner inhabited by the souls of countless soldiers.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_08B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A charm a witch might use. Kindles a tiny bit of magical power.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_08C
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A charm a witch might use. Kindles a little bit of magical power.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_08D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A charm a witch might use. Kindles some magical power.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_08E
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A charm a witch might use. Kindles considerable magical power.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_08F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A charm a witch might use. Kindles immense magical power.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_090
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A hair accessory inscribed with runes. Unleashes the sixth sense of the wearer.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_091
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A ring that grants the wearer more experience in battle.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_092
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A charm that maximizes the user's experience in battle.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_09B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}So loud, the wearer can't become distracted. Prevents Dizzy.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0A4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A wooden tag that lowers the chance of becoming frozen.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0A5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A wooden tag that lowers the chance of getting shocked.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0A6
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A wooden tag that lowers the chance of becoming poisoned.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0A7
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A wooden tag that lowers the chance of becoming confused.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0A8
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A wooden tag that lowers the chance of becoming distressed.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0A9
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A wooden tag that lowers the chance of becoming infatuated.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0AA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A wooden tag that lowers the chance of becoming afraid.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0AB
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A wooden tag that lowers the chance of becoming enraged.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0B4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A wooden tag that increases the chance of inflicting Confuse.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0B5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A wooden tag that increases the chance of inflicting Distress.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0B7
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A wooden tag that increases the chance of inflicting Fear.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0B9
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A wooden tag that increases the chance of inflicting Dizzy.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0C8
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Earrings that slightly reduce damage taken from Slash attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0C9
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A brooch that moderately reduces damage taken from Slash attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0CA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A necklace that heavily reduces damage taken from Slash attacks.[n]

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Earrings that slightly reduce damage taken from Strike attacks.[n]

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A necklace that heavily reduces damage taken from magic attacks.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0F0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A bangle with a bright design. Increases Light damage.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0F1
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Contains the power of the dawn goddess. Greatly increases Light damage.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0F2
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A bangle with a somber design. Increases Dark damage.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0F3
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Contains the power of the night goddess. Greatly increases Dark damage.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0F4
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A bangle with a sword design. Increases Slash damage.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0F5
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Contains the power of a divine sword. Greatly increases Slash damage.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0F6
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A bangle with a fist design. Increases Strike damage.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0F7
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Contains the power of a divine mace. Greatly increases Strike damage.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0F8
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A bangle with an arrow design. Increases Pierce damage.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_0F9
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Contains the power of a divine bow. Greatly increases Pierce damage.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_104
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A shawl that resists Fire damage for 3 turns at the start of battle.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_105
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A shawl that resists Ice damage for 3 turns at the start of battle.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_106
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A shawl that resists Elec damage for 3 turns at the start of battle.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_107
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A shawl that resists Wind damage for 3 turns at the start of battle.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_108
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Recovers SP when the wearer is on the receiving end of a Shift.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_109
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A prototype accessory that protects its wearer with a magnetic field.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_10A
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A luxurious gold band. Boosts all attributes moderately.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_10B
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Raises Attack when the wearer is on the receiving end of a Shift.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_10C
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A charm that restores all HP upon death once per battle.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_10D
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Releases a surge of strength powered by the wearer's bonds.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_10E
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}An adorable keychain that Chihiro made for you.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_10F
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}A luxury necklace that protects the wearer from all ailments.[n]

Dialog.name: Item_110
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Earrings that restore 1 HP upon death once per battle.[n]
